title: Best Bachelor of Physiotherapy (B.P.T.) Colleges in Noida
content: The Physiotherapy programme was introduced in 2013 and has excellent curriculum as per the guidelines of Ministry of Health and Family Welfare designed to prepare skilled and competent Physiotherapists. Program is IAP recognized and all the faculty members are competent in their respective field of specializations. The skilled faculties who are the main pillars of department always promote the learning process with their expertise skills and also serve as an inspiration to the students in making skilled & competent professionals. The students of physiotherapy programme undergo evidence-based practices to improve their clinical skills.For clinical training and internship, the department has MOUs with renowned hospitals in Delhi/NCR and in campus OPD facility for patient care and hands on training To Practice as a Physiotherapist. To detect & evaluate the Anatomical, Patho-physiological impairments, resulting in dysfunction of various age groups & occupations; as well as epidemiological sectors in the population and arrive at an appropriate diagnosis. To understand the rationale & basic investigative approach to the medical system & surgical Intervention regimens; accordingly plan & implement specific Physio-Therapy measures effectively. To promote health in general, as well as in competitive activities e.g. sports, work productivity, geriatrics, women's health etc. XII with minimum 50% marks in Physics, Chemistry and Biology (PCB).Candidate should have passed in English Subject as well. The minimum age should be 17 years as on December 31st of each Admission Year. (Medical fitness certificate is mandatory to submit and it is to be endorsed by Government Medical Officer) 01 02 03 04 05 06 07 08 09 01 Engage in evidence-based treatment and collaborate with other professionals in a multidisciplinary team. 02 Take up higher education for career growth and research. 03 Provide solutions for improving quality of life with effective physiotherapy rehabilitation. XII with minimum 50% marks in Physics, Chemistry and Biology (PCB).Candidate should have passed in English Subject as well. The minimum age should be 17 years as on December 31st of each Admission Year. (Medical fitness certificate is mandatory to submit and it is to be endorsed by Government Medical Officer)
